channel.title: skepticsguide TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from skepticsguide

item.title: No, airfryers will not transfer antimony into the food. Feel free to use your adult easy bake oven. #antimony #airfryers #airfryer @Moon Loops Co.
item.description: No, airfryers will not transfer antimony into the food. Feel free to use your adult easy bake oven. #antimony #airfryers #airfryer @Moon Loops Co.

item.title: No, doctors are not lying to you to keep you on the pharmaceutical drip. @JP Patterson the solution may just be significantly more boring or complex than you want it to be. #medicine
item.description: No, doctors are not lying to you to keep you on the pharmaceutical drip. @JP Patterson the solution may just be significantly more boring or complex than you want it to be. #medicine

item.title: If this water could talk it’d probably say “please stop turning me into pee”. #watermemory @Revival Of Wisdom
